title: Section 11
content: 11. Prohibition of removal or transplantation of 2 [human organs or tissues or both] for any purpose other than the rapeatic purposes.-- No donor and no person empowered to give authority for the removal of any human organ shall authorise the removal of any 1[human organ or tissue or both] for any purpose other than therapeutic purposes.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 16 of 2011, s. 4, for "human organ" (w.e.f. 10-1-2014). 2. Subs. by s. 4, ibid., for "human organs" (w.e.f. 10-1-2014).
